positive: A minimalist and elegant depiction of a cosmic forest at night. Silhouette style, featuring stylized, branching bioluminescent trees with glowing, nebular flora. The central focus is a grand, winding river of milk-way light reflecting off the dark forest floor. The color palette should be deep sapphire blue, indigo, luminous teal, and accents of warm gold and violet. High contrast, clean edges, perfect for fabric print. Composition is circular and balanced, designed for central chest placement. Ink wash aesthetic, vector art quality, symmetry, ethereal.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, grainy, artifacts, low detail, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts
